
  // Type_else
  public class Type_else {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
  }
  // Generic_else_any
  public class Generic_else_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    var backref : Type_else = e_else
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_else
    }
  }
  // Generic_else_type
  public class Generic_else_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
  }
  // v_else_create
  public static func v_else_create(
  ) -> Type_else {
    var output : Type_else = Type_else()
    v_else_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_else_register
  public static func v_else_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_else_startup_type()
    v_else_startup_empty()
    return t_else
  }
  // v_else_startup - mutating
  public static func v_else_startup(
    _ value : Type_else
  ) {
    let generic_any = Generic_else_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_else,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_else_startup_empty
  public static func v_else_startup_empty() {
    v_else_startup(e_else)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_else,
      e_else.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_else_startup_type
  public static func v_else_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_else
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_else_from_elsen("vx/core/else")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_func
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_else_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // f_else
  public static func f_else(
    _ fn_any : Type_any_from_func
  ) -> Type_thenelse {
    var output : Type_thenelse = Vx_Core.f_thenelse(
      Vx_Core.f_anylist(
        v_any_from_stringn(":code"),
        v_any_from_stringn(":else"),
        v_any_from_from_stringn(":fn-any"),
        v_any_from_fn_any(fn_any.type_any)
      )
    )
    return output
  }
  public static let t_else : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.Type_type()
  public static let e_else : Type_else = Type_else()
